_comment: Copy to .sbconfig.json (gitignored) and fill in. The generator reads local repo clones + gh for counts, and merges these curated fields. denylist/denylistRaw = terms that must NEVER reach the public board (customer names, infra ids, SQL); generation fails if any appear in data.json.
mission: One-line mission shown under the title.

projects.name: My Project
projects.blurb: One line: what this project is.
projects.blocker: optional — if set, shows in the blocker strip and fails the health rubric
